title: pilostemon karategina
intro: Pilostemon karategina, also known as pilosula or Caucasian pilosula, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilostemon karategina include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Pilostemon karategina are typically made from its flowers and leaves, which are used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
